chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-115 of 2024 (Niaz Ali Chandio v. The State & others) FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 1110/24 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 111/24 4.For hearing of main case. Mr. Yaseen Ali Ghunio, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 25-03-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.: Learned Deputy P.G for the State has waived notice of this application filed against order dated 10.02.2024, whereby Crl. Pre-Arrest Bail Application of private respondents in Crime No.222 of 2023, registered at P.S, Kotdiji under sections 397, 337H(ii) & 504 PPC, was allowed and interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to them has been confirmed on same terms and conditions. 2. Learned counsel for applicant/complainant submits that he would be satisfied if directions are issued to the trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within a reasonable time, to which learned Deputy P.G for the State has recorded no objection. 3. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed applications is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it preferably within a period of three months on merits, in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
